name: levineam--agent-skills-context-engineering
description: OpenClaw wrapper for Muratcan Koylan's Agent Skills for Context Engineering. 13 skills covering context optimization, multi-agent patterns, memory systems, tool design, and evaluation frameworks for production AI agents. Auto-read triggers proactively load the right sub-skill during normal operation (compaction, multi-agent spawns, failure recovery, tool building, memory setup).
